dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8519 IH: To require the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency to waive Reid Vapor Pressure requirements with respect to calendar year 2026, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mast introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To require the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency to waive Reid Vapor Pressure requirements with respect to calendar year 2026, and for other purposes.

section.header: Waiver of Reid Vapor Pressure requirements with respect to calendar year 2026

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, with respect to the period beginning on May 1, 2026, and ending on September 15, 2026, the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency shall waive the prohibition under section 211(h) of the Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. 7545(h)) on the sale, offering for sale, dispensing, supply, offering for supply, transport, and introduction into commerce of gasoline the Reid Vapor Pressure of which exceeds the applicable standard.
In this section, the term applicable standard has the meaning given such term in section 80.27(a)(2) of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor regulation.
